OLLAMA_BASE_URL.description: Ollama API base URL for local embedding (bge-m3 model)

EMBEDDING_PROVIDER.description: Embedding provider: 'ollama' (local, free), 'gemini' (Google cloud), or 'auto' (Ollama first, Gemini fallback)

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key (required if EMBEDDING_PROVIDER is 'gemini' or 'auto')

DEFAULT_PROJECT.description: Default project identifier for memory isolation
